query:
SELECT symbol, underlyingSymbol, action, strike, expiration, quantity, fillPrice, totalValue, netPremium, status, filledAt, accountId, strategy
FROM orderHistory
WHERE filledAt >= '2026-03-01' OR createdAt >= '2026-03-01'
ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 50;
